backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICDex grid trading bot; manages bot configuration, order placement/cancellation, activity logging, and balance queries against ICP and ckBTC ledgers using timers for periodic execution.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state from an older ICDex interface (without `getDepositAccount`) to the extended ICDexExtended interface, preserving all other state fields.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full app layout with a sticky header, footer, and panels including BalancePanel, BotControlPanel, ConfigurationPanel, MarketDataPanel, GridPreviewTable, OpenOrdersPanel, TradeHistoryPanel, and ActivityLogPanel.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: Activity log panel that displays timestamped bot events with color-coded rows, highlighting order errors in red with an ERR badge and supporting loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/BalancePanel.tsx: Displays the bot's ICP and ckBTC balances fetched via `useBalances`, showing loading/error states, zero-balance warnings, and a manual refresh button.
Provides start/stop controls for the trading bot, showing current running status, active configuration summary, and error messages from start/stop mutations.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: Form panel for viewing and updating bot configuration (spread pips, order count, interval, order size) with validation, save feedback, and a derived grid preview.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Renders a symmetric buy/sell grid preview table derived from the last backend grid and bot config, highlighting levels that have matching open orders.
Shows live ICDex market data (mid price, best bid/ask, spread in pips, order book depth) with staleness detection, error handling, and a manual refresh button.
Displays the user's open orders in a scrollable panel with buy/sell side coloring, price/quantity formatting, and a cancel-all button using React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: Renders a scrollable trade history panel showing past orders with side, price, quantity, status, and relative timestamp, sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout, identity persistence via AuthClient, and status tracking, exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks for the trading bot backend, including queries for bot status, config, orders, balances, and mutations for starting/stopping the bot and managing orders.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a terminal-themed dark color palette using OKLCH CSS variables, Tailwind base/component/utility layers, JetBrains Mono font, and custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (JetBrains Mono), OKLCH-based color tokens (including terminal-specific colors), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations. Enables dark mode via class, and includes the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the ICP Grid Trading Bot project at version 46, recording canister principals, architectural notes, known build issues, and a list of pending feature requests (AR-1 through AR-6) covering ckBTC deposit logic, dashboard UI, and code audits.
